claudeTeam.name: DARIO
claudeTeam.lore: Anthropic CEO. Anchors the Claude side around frontier-model safety, governance, and strategic clarity.

dossier.tagline: Safety-first macro player for Team Claude.

background.text: Anthropic describes its company mission around reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems; Dario Amodei is the executive face of that safety-first posture.

keyProjects.name: Anthropic safety and governance frame
keyProjects.description: The Claude-side narrative is built on Anthropic's public positioning around responsible frontier AI.

strengths.label: Strategic framing
strengths.description: Turns model competition into a governance and safety argument rather than a pure feature race.

narrative.title: Defensive Supercycle
narrative.text: A boss character built around patience, policy terrain, and long-horizon scaling discipline.

claudeTeam.name: DANIELA
claudeTeam.lore: Anthropic president. Public company materials put her close to product and operating structure decisions.

dossier.tagline: The operating spine behind Claude's enterprise posture.

background.text: Anthropic's company materials place Daniela Amodei in the public leadership layer of the organization.

keyProjects.name: Anthropic operating model
keyProjects.description: A leadership role tied to converting frontier research into a durable company and customer platform.

strengths.label: Org translation
strengths.description: Connects the lab's safety thesis to the operating structure needed for enterprise adoption.

narrative.title: Org Velocity
narrative.text: A support-class fighter whose buffs come from coordination, process, and keeping the lab's field position coherent.

claudeTeam.name: MIKE
claudeTeam.lore: Anthropic Labs builder. Anthropic says he moved from CPO into Labs to build experimental Claude products with Ben Mann.

dossier.tagline: Product experimenter turning Claude capability into new surfaces.

background.text: Anthropic's Labs announcement says Mike Krieger moved into Labs with Ben Mann to incubate experimental products at the frontier of Claude capabilities.

keyProjects.name: Anthropic Labs
keyProjects.description: A product incubation group for frontier Claude products, including experimental workflow surfaces.

strengths.label: Prototype-to-product loop
strengths.description: Works at the boundary between research capability and product experience.

narrative.title: Experiment Loop
narrative.text: A fast builder class that wins by finding the product shape before the rest of the field names the category.

claudeTeam.name: ANDREJ
claudeTeam.lore: OpenAI founding member and public AI educator. Axios reports he joined Anthropic's pre-training team in May 2026.

dossier.tagline: New Anthropic research pickup with OpenAI, Tesla, and education credibility.

background.text: Axios reported on May 19, 2026 that Andrej Karpathy announced he was joining Anthropic and would start on the pre-training team.
Axios describes Karpathy as a founding member of OpenAI, former Tesla AI leader, and influential public educator.

keyProjects.name: Anthropic pre-training research
keyProjects.description: Axios says he is joining the team responsible for massive training runs that give Claude its core knowledge and capabilities.

keyProjects.name: Public AI education
keyProjects.description: Axios notes that he built a large following through technical explainers and educational content.

strengths.label: Frontier credibility
strengths.description: Carries rare status across research, industry, and public education.

narrative.title: The Transfer Window Shock
narrative.text: A late-season unlock for Team Claude: research prestige, educator aura, and a pre-training questline aimed straight at the model core.

claudeTeam.name: BORIS
claudeTeam.lore: Claude Code lead and high-signal product voice. Useful for spotting workflow changes before they become official copy.

dossier.tagline: Claude Code signal source for developer workflow changes.

background.text: Anthropic's Labs announcement identifies Claude Code as a major product pillar, making Claude Code builders high-value roster signals.

keyProjects.name: Claude Code watchpoint
keyProjects.description: Tracked for developer workflow clues around terminals, agent plans, and code execution loops.

strengths.label: Workflow radar
strengths.description: Useful for spotting practical Claude Code direction before it appears in polished launch copy.

narrative.title: Terminal Pressure
narrative.text: A code-side striker whose meter fills when Claude moves from chat into the repo.

claudeTeam.name: NOAH
claudeTeam.lore: Claude Code PM. Watch for product framing, launch sequencing, and user-workflow clues.

dossier.tagline: Roadmap scout for Claude Code product framing.

background.text: The platform tracks Noah Zweben as a Claude Code product signal, anchored to Anthropic's public Claude Code product context.

keyProjects.name: Claude Code product sequencing
keyProjects.description: Monitored for user-workflow clues and launch framing around Claude Code.

strengths.label: User workflow read

narrative.title: Roadmap Tell
narrative.text: A scout class that turns small product-language changes into early map reveals.

codexTeam.name: SAM
codexTeam.lore: OpenAI CEO. The Codex side inherits OpenAI's consumer distribution, capital stack, and compute narrative.

dossier.tagline: Distribution and capital gravity for Team Codex.

background.text: OpenAI's capital announcement frames consumer adoption, enterprise deployment, developer usage, and compute as a reinforcing flywheel.

keyProjects.name: OpenAI distribution flywheel
keyProjects.description: The Codex side inherits the reach of ChatGPT, the API, and OpenAI's capital and compute narrative.

strengths.label: Market gravity
strengths.description: Turns company-level momentum into product attention for Codex and adjacent developer workflows.

narrative.title: Market Gravity
narrative.text: A commander class whose special meter charges through distribution, capital, and public narrative pressure.

codexTeam.name: GREG

narrative.title: Baremetal Combo

codexTeam.name: FIDJI
codexTeam.lore: CEO of Applications at OpenAI. Important for how Codex and ChatGPT turn research into product and business workflows.

dossier.tagline: Applications-side scale operator for OpenAI products.

keyProjects.description: A product and business-workflow lens for ChatGPT, Codex, and OpenAI's broader applications layer.

strengths.label: Product scaling
strengths.description: Converts model capability into repeatable product surfaces and business workflows.

narrative.title: Applications Scale
narrative.text: A growth-class fighter who turns research unlocks into surfaces people actually use.

codexTeam.name: JAKUB

codexTeam.name: TIBO
codexTeam.lore: Codex builder at OpenAI. High-signal account for practical product direction and developer workflow changes.

keyProjects.name: Codex ship loop

codexTeam.name: ROMAIN
codexTeam.lore: Head of Developer Experience at OpenAI, working on Codex and the API. Useful for developer-platform positioning.

dossier.tagline: Developer-experience amplifier for OpenAI's platform surface.

background.text: OpenAI's Codex customer story positions developer workflow as a strategic platform surface; Romain Huet is tracked as a developer-experience roster signal.

keyProjects.description: Monitored for Codex, API, docs, and developer-platform positioning signals.

strengths.label: Developer translation

narrative.title: Just Build Things
narrative.text: A developer-relations caster whose buffs make Codex feel closer to the terminal.

codexTeam.name: JASON
codexTeam.lore: Developer Experience Engineer on the Codex team at OpenAI. Creator of Instructor, a Python library for structured LLM outputs.

dossier.tagline: Structured-output specialist bringing schema discipline to Codex.

background.text: Jason Liu says he is a Developer Experience Engineer on the Codex team at OpenAI.
His site says he created Instructor, a Python library for structured LLM outputs that OpenAI cited as inspiration for structured outputs.

keyProjects.name: Instructor
keyProjects.description: Instructor maps LLM outputs to Pydantic models through a response_model workflow and keeps close compatibility with the OpenAI Python SDK.

keyProjects.name: Structured outputs education
keyProjects.description: Weights & Biases lists Jason as the instructor for a course on structured outputs and data validation.

strengths.label: Schema-first product sense
strengths.description: Makes LLM behavior legible to developers by turning freeform text into typed, validated outputs.

narrative.title: Pydantic Lock
narrative.text: A control-class fighter who wins by forcing messy model output into typed lanes before the next combo starts.

codexTeam.name: PETER
codexTeam.lore: Creator of OpenClaw, the viral AI personal assistant. TechCrunch reported he joined OpenAI to work on next-generation personal agents.

dossier.tagline: Viral agent hacker turned OpenAI personal-agents builder.

background.text: TechCrunch reported that Peter Steinberger, creator of OpenClaw, joined OpenAI in February 2026.
TechCrunch describes OpenClaw as an AI personal assistant, previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot, that achieved viral popularity.

keyProjects.name: OpenClaw
keyProjects.description: A viral open-source personal-agent project that OpenAI said would live in a foundation while Steinberger worked on personal agents.

keyProjects.name: Codex swarm usage
keyProjects.description: PC Gamer reported that a posted dashboard showed 603 billion tokens across 7.6 million requests handled by around 100 Codex instances.

strengths.label: Agent-native experimentation
strengths.description: Builds by stress-testing multi-agent workflows at unusual scale and speed.

narrative.title: OpenClaw Swarm
narrative.text: A chaos-engineer class: weird side project, viral agent loop, then a direct jump into OpenAI's personal-agent lane.

arena.title: Clododex
arena.summary: A file-first arcade intelligence engine for remixable AI-agent competition concepts.

fatalities.title: MYTHOS / PROJECT GLASSWING
fatalities.subtitle: security boss phase
fatalities.unlockTrigger: Security round, exploit-defense storyline, or any matchup where DEF and ATK both matter.
fatalities.arenaEffect: +10 DEF in cyber/legal/government lanes; converts scary frontier capability into defender coalition aura.

fatalities.title: CLAUDE CODE SECURITY
fatalities.subtitle: defensive agent kit
fatalities.arenaEffect: Raises Claude trust posture by making code security a productized workflow instead of only a policy slogan.

fatalities.title: MCP + STAINLESS + SKILLS
fatalities.subtitle: agent connectivity combo
fatalities.unlockTrigger: Tool-use, enterprise data, or API-connectivity matchup.
fatalities.arenaEffect: +8 COMBO when Claude needs to reach real systems; Stainless turns MCP/SDK plumbing into a sharper platform weapon.

fatalities.title: CLAUDE FOR LEGAL
fatalities.subtitle: regulated-work wedge
fatalities.unlockTrigger: Legal, compliance, contracts, or professional-services territory fight.
fatalities.arenaEffect: Gives Claude a clean LAW lane through CoCounsel Legal and trust-heavy workflows.

fatalities.title: AWS / TRAINIUM COMPUTE BANK
fatalities.subtitle: durability reserve
fatalities.unlockTrigger: Scale, uptime, cost, or frontier-training durability matchup.
fatalities.arenaEffect: +9 HP when the fight becomes infrastructure-heavy; up to 5GW of planned capacity backs Claude demand.

fatalities.title: RUST CODEX HARNESS
fatalities.subtitle: open-source terminal weapon
fatalities.unlockTrigger: Local dev, terminal, auditability, or community-mod matchup.
fatalities.arenaEffect: +9 COMBO for transparent developer trust; the public repo exposes a Rust-heavy local agent harness.

fatalities.title: CODEX SECURITY
fatalities.subtitle: validated vuln finisher
fatalities.unlockTrigger: AppSec, threat-model, or secure-code review matchup.
fatalities.arenaEffect: +10 DEF in security rounds by pairing repository context, validation, and patch proposals.

fatalities.title: SDK / SLACK / GITHUB WORKFLOW MESH
fatalities.subtitle: assign-work-anywhere combo
fatalities.unlockTrigger: Developer workflow, async delegation, or enterprise collaboration fight.
fatalities.arenaEffect: +8 SPD when work can be assigned from ChatGPT, CLI, GitHub, Slack-like collaboration, or other product surfaces.

fatalities.title: STARGATE COMPUTE
fatalities.subtitle: infrastructure super meter
fatalities.arenaEffect: +10 HP when product distribution needs frontier compute to keep compounding.

fatalities.title: OPENAI INTERNAL CODEX LOOP
fatalities.subtitle: dogfood telemetry
fatalities.arenaEffect: +7 ATK and SPD when internal OpenAI use turns repetitive SWE work into product feedback for Codex.

scoringRubric.disclaimer: Arcade scores are narrative indices, not scientific benchmarks. Each number should point to a public-source rationale.

characterStats.ATK: Product or research offensive pressure: launches, model strength, public agenda-setting, or concrete builder leverage.
characterStats.DEF: Safety, trust, compliance, security, governance, and ability to absorb scrutiny.
characterStats.SPD: Shipping speed and signal velocity: how quickly the person or surface turns capability into visible motion.
characterStats.COMBO: Platform leverage: integrations, ecosystem effects, workflow chaining, and ability to compound with other moves.
characterStats.HP: Durability: capital, compute, org depth, adoption, technical moat, and staying power.

teamPower.momentum: Recent public signals plus strategic weight of launches, hires, partnerships, and adoption proof.
teamPower.mindshare: Share of attention in developer, enterprise, and public product narratives.
teamPower.enterprise: Evidence of paid business workflows, regulated-industry adoption, partnerships, and deployment credibility.
teamPower.ship: Visible product releases, workflow surface expansion, and cadence of concrete shipping moves.

scoringRubric.verticals: Vertical conquest blends public product fit, enterprise proof, partner distribution, and inferred adoption pressure. Close scores are intentionally contested.
